Title: Elusive Bounty: ~mission(TargetName) (HRT)
Description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Bounty Collection
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: I. Takao
RISK ASSESSMENT: High Risk Target (Armed Support)

Hurston Dynamics is seeking a contractor to complete a bounty for ~mission(TargetName). This bounty has proven extremely elusive so far, but intel reports have tracked the target and a cohort of their known associates to ~mission(Location|Address). 

However, there is a strong chance that ~mission(TargetName|Last) will not risk a confrontation unless absolutely forced to. It is our recommendation that you neutralize a significant portion of the criminal’s allies first in order to draw them out. The report indicates that a large party of these hostiles are currently near the ~mission(Location).

Payment will be released only after the bounty has been deemed complete.




** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **
